questionHtml:
A beam of electrons each of de Broglie wavelength 2.4 × 10–15 m is incident on a thin film of silicon-30  ( 14 30 Si ) . The variation in the electron intensity of the beam with scattering angle is shown.

Outline why deviations from Rutherford scattering are observed when high-energy alpha particles are incident on nuclei.
markschemeHtml:
nuclear forces act ✔

nuclear recoil occurs ✔

significant penetration into nucleus / probing internal structure of individual nucleons ✔

incident particles are relativistic ✔

meta.title: Outline why deviations from Rutherford scattering are observed when high-energy alpha particles are incident on nuclei.
